storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH014_SC005

## Production Intent
Execute the transition from aerial transit to ground contact at a major landmark. The sequence must establish the scale of the Emerald City relative to the characters and capture the emotional shift from flight-tension to arrival-relief.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto
- winged_monkeys

## Required Environments
- aerial_landscape_transit
- The Gates of the Emerald City

## Continuity Constraints
- Visual appearance and scale of The Gates of the Emerald City
- Physical transition from flight to ground contact

## Beat List
- BT001: Aerial approach to the city
- BT002: The descent
- BT003: Safe landing and relief
